message:
fix: surface partial work warnings in stale hook scanner output (gt-ajx6l)

The stale hook scanner collected worktree state (PartialWork, WorktreeDirty,
UnpushedCount) but never displayed it in CLI output. Add per-bead partial
work warnings and a summary count so operators see when unhooked beads had
uncommitted changes or unpushed commits.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
